title: pass 3 clean: no further findings beyond 3 filed
description: Pass 3 read all 12 source files in src/ plus tests/integration.rs. Three substantive findings were filed (broadside-3ctt.1, .2, .3). The remaining patterns examined and cleared: id.rs expect() on UNIX_EPOCH is unreachable in practice (clock-before-epoch panics on any sane OS); FeedConfig::interval() expect() is invariant-protected by Config::validate() at load time; the query.page.unwrap_or(1) dead-code idiom (server.rs:292) is harmless; private_key String conversion comment (persona.rs:22) is accurate, just acknowledging an unavoidable limitation of SQLite storage; delivery.rs chrono unwrap_or is dead code for the given RETRY_DELAYS values. No additional crypto, unsafe, or Rust idiom issues found beyond what is tracked.
close_reason: Pass 3 fixes: HMAC key compare, inbox SSRF guard, domain validation, async Accept dispatch, foreign keys, IPv6 SSRF, poll timeout. Remaining P2-P3 accepted as known debt.
